## 🎯 **PHASE 4: FRONTEND SETUP (THIS WEEK - 2 HRS)**

### **Sanity Client Setup (30 min)**
- [ ] Install: `npm install @sanity/client next-sanity`
- [ ] Create: `src/lib/sanity-client.ts`
- [ ] Add env vars to `.env.local`
- [ ] Test connection

### **Product Listing (30 min)**
- [ ] Update `app/(shop)/shop/page.tsx`
- [ ] Fetch products from Sanity
- [ ] Replace mock data with real data
- [ ] Test product grid displays

### **Product Details (30 min)**
- [ ] Update `app/(shop)/product/[slug]/page.tsx`
- [ ] Fetch product by slug
- [ ] Display all product data
- [ ] Show variants if available

### **Reviews Display (30 min)**
- [ ] Fetch reviews by product
- [ ] Display review cards
- [ ] Show ratings
- [ ] Calculate average

**✅ PHASE 4 COMPLETE!** → Move to Phase 5

## 🎯 **PHASE 7: DEPLOY (LAUNCH DAY - 2 HRS)**

### **Pre-Deploy (30 min)**
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] No errors
- [ ] Images optimized
- [ ] SEO complete

### **Studio Deploy (15 min)**
- [ ] Run: `cd studio`
- [ ] Run: `npm run build`
- [ ] Run: `npm run deploy`
- [ ] Test studio URL

### **Frontend Deploy (30 min)**
- [ ] Push to GitHub
- [ ] Deploy on Vercel
- [ ] Set env variables
- [ ] Test production

### **Post-Deploy (45 min)**
- [ ] Test live site
- [ ] Check all pages
- [ ] Verify images
- [ ] Test on mobile
- [ ] Monitor errors

**✅ PHASE 7 COMPLETE!** → 🎉 **LAUNCH SUCCESS!**
